title: Big Friendship
author: Aminatou Sow
subline: How we keep each other close from far apart.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <text x="800" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">17 YEARS · 17 THREADS</text>
  <line x1="640" y1="360" x2="960" y2="360" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="420" x2="960" y2="420" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="480" x2="960" y2="480" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="540" x2="960" y2="540" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="600" x2="960" y2="600" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="660" x2="960" y2="660" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="720" x2="960" y2="720" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="780" x2="960" y2="780" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="840" x2="960" y2="840" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="900" x2="960" y2="900" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="960" x2="960" y2="960" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="1020" x2="960" y2="1020" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="1080" x2="960" y2="1080" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="1140" x2="960" y2="1140" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="1200" x2="960" y2="1200" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="1260" x2="960" y2="1260" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.7"/><line x1="640" y1="1320" x2="960" y2="1320" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" opacity="1"/>
  <text x="610" y="365" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">2004</text><text x="610" y="545" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">2007</text><text x="610" y="725" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">2010</text><text x="610" y="905" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">2013</text><text x="610" y="1085" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">2016</text><text x="610" y="1265" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">2019</text>
  <circle cx="640" cy="320" r="6" fill="#cccccc"/><circle cx="960" cy="320" r="6" fill="#cccccc"/><circle cx="640" cy="1380" r="6" fill="#4c4c4c"/><circle cx="960" cy="1380" r="6" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
</svg>
rationale: Two vertical posts run parallel, connected by 17 horizontal threads of varying intensity — a friendship rope, the years of a long-term bond made visible. The 17th thread (most recent) is red. Below, 320px mixed-case Big / Friendship title in weight 300. Friendship is a series of intentional connections across distance.
